[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 1010001 3
4 1010100 3
5 0000100 1
6 1101111 6
7 1100101 4

01 10 1010101 4
12 21 1010100 3 match 4
23 32 1101111 6 match 6
34 43 1101111 6 match 6
45 54 1110101 5
56 65 1110011 5
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1111111 a

02 20 1010101 4
13 31 1111111 a
24 42 1100101 4 match 7

46 64 1110111 6
57 75 1111111 a
60 06 1110011 5
71 17 1111110 6

50 05 1110001 4
61 16 1110111 6
72 27 0101110 4
